questions.question: What is the primary goal of customer churn prediction in a telecommunications company?

answers.b: To identify customers likely to leave the service
answers.c: To reduce the cost of mobile devices

explanations.a: Network speed improvement is not related to churn prediction.
explanations.b: Customer churn prediction helps identify customers who may stop using the service.
explanations.c: Device cost reduction is unrelated to churn prediction.
explanations.d: Bandwidth improvement does not directly relate to predicting churn.

questions.question: Which type of machine learning problem is customer churn prediction?

explanations.a: Regression predicts continuous values, not class labels.
explanations.b: Churn prediction classifies customers into churn or non-churn categories.
explanations.c: Clustering groups similar data without predefined labels.
explanations.d: Dimensionality reduction reduces the number of features.

questions.question: Which machine learning model represents decisions in a tree-like structure?

explanations.b: Decision Tree uses nodes and branches to represent decisions and outcomes.
explanations.c: Naive Bayes is a probabilistic classifier.

questions.question: Why is data preprocessing important before training a machine learning model?

answers.b: To prepare data by handling missing values and encoding features
answers.c: To reduce the number of models used
answers.d: To increase the number of output classes

explanations.a: Algorithms are not removed during preprocessing.
explanations.b: Preprocessing prepares the dataset by cleaning data and converting features into a usable format.
explanations.c: The number of models used does not depend on preprocessing.
explanations.d: Preprocessing does not change the number of classes.

questions.question: What is the purpose of splitting a dataset into training and testing sets?

answers.b: To train the model and evaluate its performance on unseen data
answers.c: To remove features from the dataset
answers.d: To reduce the number of records

explanations.a: Splitting does not increase the dataset size.
explanations.b: Training data is used to build the model, and testing data evaluates its performance.
explanations.c: Feature removal is not the purpose of dataset splitting.
explanations.d: Splitting does not reduce records permanently.

questions.question: Which algorithm combines multiple decision trees to improve prediction performance?

explanations.a: Random Forest is an ensemble method that builds multiple decision trees and combines their predictions.
explanations.b: Logistic Regression is a linear classification algorithm.
explanations.c: KNN predicts based on the nearest data points.
